Created by a mother. Perfected with science.

Every Leo’s & Divas product begins with one simple question —
What would I trust on my own child, every single day?
Our formulations combine carefully selected natural ingredients with globally trusted cosmetic science, ensuring each product is gentle, effective, and made for real baby skin — not trends.

settings.subheading: Inspired by timeless wisdom, our premium baby care range nurtures your little one with nature’s purest touch. Each product is crafted with gentle, ingredients to support healthy growth and radiant well-being. Because true care begins with nature’s harmony.

Fewer products. Better care.

We didn’t launch with dozens of products — because babies don’t need dozens.Each product in our range has a clear purpose, a thoughtful formulation, and a place in everyday baby care. As your needs grow, our range will grow — intentionally.

settings.heading: A note from a mother.
settings.content: I didn’t create Leo’s & Divas to build another baby brand.I created it to simplify choices for parents like me — who want clean, gentle care backed by understanding and science, not confusion.Every product is something I use, trust, and stand behind — as a mother first.

Frequently asked questions
Our goal is for every customer to be totally satisfied with their purchase. If this isn't the case, let us know and we'll do our best to work with you to make it right.
We are unable to accept returns on certain items. These will be carefully marked before purchase.

settings.heading: When will I get my order?

settings.text: We will work quickly to ship your order as soon as possible. Once your order has shipped, you will receive an email with further information. Delivery times vary depending on your location.
Our products are manufactured both locally and globally. We carefully select our manufacturing partners to ensure our products are high quality and a fair value.
Shipping is calculated based on your location and the items in your order. You will always know the shipping price before you purchase.
